title: Fear Garden — Level 3 Junior Detective
description: LEVEL 3 JUNIOR DETECTIVE CASE version of Fear Garden with unique suspect, method, motive, evidence, and answers.

answerKey.method: Triggered a locked cooler CO2 leak in the side prep room and delayed the alarm
answerKey.motive: To keep Simone from revealing Janelle’s fake vendor contract for the garden expansion
answerKey.keyEvidence: Cooler alarm delay, vendor contract draft, and janelle’s service-room badge swipe
answerKey.explanation: Janelle Price had the access, timing, and motive. The proof path combines cooler alarm delay, vendor contract draft, and Janelle’s service-room badge swipe with the failed statement: Janelle said she was checking wristbands outside.

publicClues.title: Case Opened
publicClues.text: Fear Garden begins at Beer Garden in Baton Rouge, Louisiana. This session is Level 3: Junior Detective Case.

publicClues.title: Difficulty Loaded
publicClues.text: This is Level 3: Junior Detective Case. Evidence and answers are unique to this level.

publicClues.title: Checkpoint 1 Available
publicClues.text: Round 1 is ready. Answer the checkpoint after reviewing the body scene.

publicClues.title: Checkpoint 2 Available
publicClues.text: Round 2 is ready. Compare the timeline before answering.

publicClues.title: Checkpoint 3 Available
publicClues.text: Round 3 is ready. Digital and venue systems now matter.

publicClues.title: Checkpoint 4 Available
publicClues.text: Round 4 is ready. Find the motive evidence.

publicClues.title: Final Accusation Open
publicClues.text: Final questions are open. Complete all 10 total questions before the lock.

phone.title: Phone Evidence 1
phone.text: Simone Hart missed two calls from Janelle Price before the garden music cut out.

phone.title: Phone Evidence 2
phone.text: A final call lasted eleven seconds as Simone moved toward the side corridor.

messages.title: Messages Evidence 1
messages.text: Simone texted Janelle: “We talk tonight. I saw the numbers.”

messages.title: Messages Evidence 2
messages.text: Janelle replied: “Not at the bar. Meet by the garden gate.”

maps.title: Maps Evidence 1
maps.text: Simone’s phone pinged near the patio garden path at 8:07 PM.

maps.title: Maps Evidence 2
maps.text: Janelle’s device appears nearby during the same short window.

bank.title: Bank Evidence 1
bank.text: A Beer Garden event ledger shows a suspicious private payout connected to keep simone from revealing janelle’s fake vendor contract for the garden expansion.

bank.title: Bank Evidence 2
bank.text: The payout trail links to a device or account controlled by Janelle.

photos.title: Photos Evidence 1
photos.text: A guest photo shows Janelle near the restricted service path before the incident.

photos.title: Photos Evidence 2
photos.text: Another photo captures the scene detail: cooler alarm was delayed three minutes.

social.title: Social Evidence 1
social.text: A patio livestream catches a missing gap just before Simone disappears from frame.

social.title: Social Evidence 2
social.text: The posted version removes the seconds that would show who crossed behind the garden wall.

contacts.title: Contacts Evidence 1
contacts.text: Janelle saved a contact under “Garden Services,” matching a suspicious payment line.

contacts.title: Contacts Evidence 2
contacts.text: Simone saved the same number with the note “ask about fake paperwork.”

notes.title: Notes Evidence 1
notes.text: Detective note: the killer needed venue access, timing, and a reason to silence Simone.

notes.title: Notes Evidence 2
notes.text: Detective note: the scene points to planning, not a random Beer Garden accident.

files.title: Files Evidence 1
files.text: A security export skips the exact Beer Garden patio window.

files.title: Files Evidence 2
files.text: File metadata connects the edit to the suspect’s access trail: Janelle Price.

browser.title: Browser Evidence 1
browser.text: A browser search asks how to remove timestamp metadata from venue clips.

browser.title: Browser Evidence 2
browser.text: Another search matches the method: triggered a locked cooler co2 leak in the side prep room and delayed the alarm.

rounds.title: Final Accusation
rounds.objective: Answer the final five questions to close Fear Garden.

openingNarration: Detectives, welcome to Fear Garden at Beer Garden in Baton Rouge, Louisiana. You are playing Level 3: Junior Detective Case. Study each app carefully. Every level has its own truth path, evidence trail, and final answer set.
revealScript: Case closed. This was Level 3: Junior Detective Case. The culprit was Janelle Price. The method: Triggered a locked cooler CO2 leak in the side prep room and delayed the alarm. The motive: To keep Simone from revealing Janelle’s fake vendor contract for the garden expansion. The proof: Cooler alarm delay, vendor contract draft, and janelle’s service-room badge swipe.

questions.prompt: Checkpoint 1: What makes Simone’s death suspicious?

options.label: A normal spilled pint near the stage
A table number written backward
A guest closing a patio umbrella
cooler alarm was delayed three minutes

questions.prompt: Checkpoint 2: Which timeline clue matters most?

options.label: Janelle’s badge opened the prep room twice
The DJ restarted a playlist
A guest paid with cash
A server dropped a tray outside

questions.prompt: Checkpoint 3: Which digital clue suggests planning?

options.label: A low battery warning
fake vendor contract uses Janelle’s home printer metadata
A misspelled hashtag
A normal Wi-Fi reconnect

questions.prompt: Checkpoint 4: What clue points toward motive?

options.label: A birthday receipt
A lost wristband
Simone’s map ping stops inside the side prep room
An ordinary tab transfer

questions.prompt: Checkpoint 5: Which statement begins to collapse?

options.label: Maya said the plants were watered
Janelle said the gate was busy
Darius said the speaker was loud
Janelle said she was checking wristbands outside
Janelle Price
Maya Bell
Trevor Knox
Darius Cole

questions.prompt: Final 2: How was the murder carried out?

options.label: Poisoned a shared punch bowl
Triggered a locked cooler CO2 leak in the side prep room and delayed the alarm
Cut the stage lights only
Staged a random parking-lot fall
To win a trivia prize
To protect a karaoke score
To keep Simone from revealing Janelle’s fake vendor contract for the garden expansion
To hide a family recipe

questions.prompt: Final 4: Which evidence best proves it?

options.label: A guest rumor and a napkin
A broken patio chair only
A single missed call with no context
Cooler alarm delay, vendor contract draft, and janelle’s service-room badge swipe

questions.prompt: Final 5: Which suspect statement falls apart?

options.label: Janelle said she was checking wristbands outside
Maya said the music was loud
Trevor said the patio was crowded
Janelle said the menu was changed
